con:part.con:content: <wsdl:definitions name="EcrComInterface" targetNamespace="http://tempuri.org/" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:wsx="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/09/mex" xmlns:wsu="http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-utility-1.0.xsd" xmlns:wsa10="http://www.w3.org/2005/08/addressing" xmlns:wsp="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/09/policy" xmlns:wsap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/08/addressing/policy" xmlns:msc="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ws/2005/12/wsdl/contract" xmlns:soap12="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap12/" xmlns:wsa="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/08/addressing" xmlns:wsam="http://www.w3.org/2007/05/addressing/metadata" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:tns="http://tempuri.org/" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:wsaw="http://www.w3.org/2006/05/addressing/wsdl" xmlns:soapenc="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/"> <wsp:Policy wsu:Id="BasicHttpsBinding_IEcrComInterface_policy"> <wsp:ExactlyOne> <wsp:All> <sp:TransportBinding xmlns:sp="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2005/07/securitypolicy"> <wsp:Policy> <sp:TransportToken> <wsp:Policy> <sp:HttpsToken RequireClientCertificate="false"/> </wsp:Policy> </sp:TransportToken> <sp:AlgorithmSuite> <wsp:Policy> <sp:Basic256/> </wsp:Policy> </sp:AlgorithmSuite> <sp:Layout> <wsp:Policy> <sp:Strict/> </wsp:Policy> </sp:Layout> </wsp:Policy> </sp:TransportBinding> </wsp:All> </wsp:ExactlyOne> </wsp:Policy> <wsdl:types> <xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://tempuri.org/Imports"> <xsd:import schemaLocation="https://ereceipt.afs.com.bh/Ecr.Bh.Afs/EcrComInterface.svc?xsd=xsd0" namespace="http://tempuri.org/"/> <xsd:import schemaLocation="https://ereceipt.afs.com.bh/Ecr.Bh.Afs/EcrComInterface.svc?xsd=xsd1" namespace="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/"/> <xsd:import schemaLocation="https://ereceipt.afs.com.bh/Ecr.Bh.Afs/EcrComInterface.svc?xsd=xsd2" namespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/"/> <xsd:import schemaLocation="https://ereceipt.afs.com.bh/Ecr.Bh.Afs/EcrComInterface.svc?xsd=xsd3" namespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Apex.Ecr.Entities"/> </xsd:schema> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="IEcrComInterface_Sale_InputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:Sale"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IEcrComInterface_Sale_OutputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:SaleResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IEcrComInterface_Void_InputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:Void"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IEcrComInterface_Void_OutputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:VoidResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IEcrComInterface_PreAuthCompletion_InputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:PreAuthCompletion"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IEcrComInterface_PreAuthCompletion_OutputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:PreAuthCompletionResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IEcrComInterface_Settlement_InputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:Settlement"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IEcrComInterface_Settlement_OutputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:SettlementResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IEcrComInterface_RequestCancellation_InputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:RequestCancellation"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IEcrComInterface_RequestCancellation_OutputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:RequestCancellationResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IEcrComInterface_Enquiry_InputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:Enquiry"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="IEcrComInterface_Enquiry_OutputMessage"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tns:EnquiryResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:portType name="IEcrComInterface"> <wsdl:operation name="Sale"> <wsdl:input wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IEcrComInterface/Sale" message="tns:IEcrComInterface_Sale_InputMessage"/> <wsdl:output wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IEcrComInterface/SaleResponse" message="tns:IEcrComInterface_Sale_OutputMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="Void"> <wsdl:input wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IEcrComInterface/Void" message="tns:IEcrComInterface_Void_InputMessage"/> <wsdl:output wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IEcrComInterface/VoidResponse" message="tns:IEcrComInterface_Void_OutputMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="PreAuthCompletion"> <wsdl:input wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IEcrComInterface/PreAuthCompletion" message="tns:IEcrComInterface_PreAuthCompletion_InputMessage"/> <wsdl:output wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IEcrComInterface/PreAuthCompletionResponse" message="tns:IEcrComInterface_PreAuthCompletion_OutputMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="Settlement"> <wsdl:input wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IEcrComInterface/Settlement" message="tns:IEcrComInterface_Settlement_InputMessage"/> <wsdl:output wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IEcrComInterface/SettlementResponse" message="tns:IEcrComInterface_Settlement_OutputMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="RequestCancellation"> <wsdl:input wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IEcrComInterface/RequestCancellation" message="tns:IEcrComInterface_RequestCancellation_InputMessage"/> <wsdl:output wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IEcrComInterface/RequestCancellationResponse" message="tns:IEcrComInterface_RequestCancellation_OutputMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="Enquiry"> <wsdl:input wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IEcrComInterface/Enquiry" message="tns:IEcrComInterface_Enquiry_InputMessage"/> <wsdl:output wsaw:Action="http://tempuri.org/IEcrComInterface/EnquiryResponse" message="tns:IEcrComInterface_Enquiry_OutputMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> <wsdl:binding name="BasicHttpsBinding_IEcrComInterface" type="tns:IEcrComInterface"> <wsp:PolicyReference URI="#BasicHttpsBinding_IEcrComInterface_policy"/> <soap:binding transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <wsdl:operation name="Sale"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://tempuri.org/IEcrComInterface/Sale" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="Void"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://tempuri.org/IEcrComInterface/Void" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="PreAuthCompletion"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://tempuri.org/IEcrComInterface/PreAuthCompletion" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="Settlement"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://tempuri.org/IEcrComInterface/Settlement" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="RequestCancellation"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://tempuri.org/IEcrComInterface/RequestCancellation" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="Enquiry"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://tempuri.org/IEcrComInterface/Enquiry" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:service name="EcrComInterface"> <wsdl:port name="BasicHttpsBinding_IEcrComInterface" binding="tns:BasicHttpsBinding_IEcrComInterface"> <soap:address location="https://ereceipt.afs.com.bh/Ecr.Bh.Afs/EcrComInterface.svc"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> </wsdl:definitions>

<xs:schema elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://tempuri.org/" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:tns="http://tempuri.org/"> <xs:import schemaLocation="https://ereceipt.afs.com.bh/Ecr.Bh.Afs/EcrComInterface.svc?xsd=xsd2" namespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/"/> <xs:element name="Sale"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="webReq" nillable="true" type="q1:SaleRequest" xmlns:q1="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="SaleResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="SaleResult" nillable="true" type="q2:SaleResponse" xmlns:q2="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="Void"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="webReq" nillable="true" type="q3:VoidRequest" xmlns:q3="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="VoidResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="VoidResult" nillable="true" type="q4:VoidResponse" xmlns:q4="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="PreAuthCompletion"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="webReq" nillable="true" type="q5:PreAuthCompletionRequest" xmlns:q5="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="PreAuthCompletionResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PreAuthCompletionResult" nillable="true" type="q6:PreAuthCompletionResponse" xmlns:q6="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="Settlement"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="webReq" nillable="true" type="q7:SettlementRequest" xmlns:q7="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="SettlementResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="SettlementResult" nillable="true" type="q8:SettlementResponse" xmlns:q8="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="RequestCancellation"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="webReq" nillable="true" type="q9:CancelRequest" xmlns:q9="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="RequestCancellationResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="RequestCancellationResult" nillable="true" type="q10:CancelResponse" xmlns:q10="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="Enquiry"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="webReq" nillable="true" type="q11:EnquiryRequest" xmlns:q11="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="EnquiryResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="EnquiryResult" nillable="true" type="q12:EnquiryResponse" xmlns:q12="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:schema>

<xs:schema elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:tns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/"> <xs:import schemaLocation="https://ereceipt.afs.com.bh/Ecr.Bh.Afs/EcrComInterface.svc?xsd=xsd3" namespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Apex.Ecr.Entities"/> <xs:complexType name="SaleRequest"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Config" nillable="true" type="tns:EcrConfig"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="EcrAmount" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Printer" nillable="true" type="tns:EcrPrinter"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="SaleRequest" nillable="true" type="tns:SaleRequest"/> <xs:complexType name="EcrConfig"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="EcrCurrencyCode" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="EcrTillerFullName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="EcrTillerUserName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="IntegratorName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="MerchantSecureKey" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Mid" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Tenant" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Tid" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="EcrConfig" nillable="true" type="tns:EcrConfig"/> <xs:complexType name="EcrPrinter"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="EnablePrintPosReceipt" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="EnablePrintReceiptNote" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="InvoiceNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PrinterWidth" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ReceiptNote" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ReferenceNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="EcrPrinter" nillable="true" type="tns:EcrPrinter"/> <xs:complexType name="SaleResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosAmount" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosAuthCode" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosBatchNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosCVMId" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosCardEntryModeId" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosCurrencyCode" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosDate" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosDccAmount" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosDccCommission" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosDccCurrencyCode" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosDccCurrencySymbol" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosDccIndicatorId" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosDccMarkup" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosDccRate" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosEmvAid" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosEmvAppName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosEmvCryptogram" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosEmvTVR" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosInvoiceNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosIssuerName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosPan" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosRRN" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosReceipt" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosReceiptFooter1" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosReceiptFooter2" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosReceiptFooter3" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosReceiptFooter4" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosReceiptHeader1" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosReceiptHeader2" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosReceiptHeader3" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosReceiptHeader4" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosRespCode" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosRespStatus" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosRespText" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosStan" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosTime" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosTxnName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="WebResponseErrorDesc" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="WebResponseStatus" type="q1:Enums.WebCallStatus" xmlns:q1="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Apex.Ecr.Entities"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="SaleResponse" nillable="true" type="tns:SaleResponse"/> <xs:complexType name="VoidRequest"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Config" nillable="true" type="tns:EcrConfig"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="OrigAuthCode" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="WebResponseStatus" type="q4:Enums.WebCallStatus" xmlns:q4="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Apex.Ecr.Entities"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="CancelResponse" nillable="true" type="tns:CancelResponse"/> <xs:complexType name="EnquiryRequest"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Config" nillable="true" type="tns:EcrConfig"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="OrigAuthCode" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="OrigInvoiceNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="OrigRrn" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="Printer" nillable="true" type="tns:EcrPrinter"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="EnquiryRequest" nillable="true" type="tns:EnquiryRequest"/> <xs:complexType name="EnquiryResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosAmount" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosAuthCode" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosBatchNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosCVMId" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosCardEntryModeId" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosCurrencyCode" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosDate" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosDccAmount" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosDccCommission" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosDccCurrencyCode" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosDccCurrencySymbol" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosDccIndicatorId" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosDccMarkup" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosDccRate" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosEmvAid" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosEmvAppName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosEmvCryptogram" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosEmvTVR" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosInvoiceNumber" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosIssuerName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosPan" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosRRN" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosReceipt" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosReceiptFooter1" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosReceiptFooter2" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosReceiptFooter3" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosReceiptFooter4" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosReceiptHeader1" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosReceiptHeader2" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosReceiptHeader3" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosReceiptHeader4" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosRespCode" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosRespStatus" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosRespText" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosStan" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosTime" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="PosTxnName" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="WebResponseErrorDesc" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="WebResponseStatus" type="q5:Enums.WebCallStatus" xmlns:q5="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Apex.Ecr.Entities"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:element name="EnquiryResponse" nillable="true" type="tns:EnquiryResponse"/> </xs:schema>

<xs:schema elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Apex.Ecr.Entities" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:tns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Apex.Ecr.Entities"> <xs:import schemaLocation="https://ereceipt.afs.com.bh/Ecr.Bh.Afs/EcrComInterface.svc?xsd=xsd1" namespace="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/"/> <xs:simpleType name="Enums.WebCallStatus"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="Success"/> <xs:enumeration value="Faild"> <xs:annotation> <xs:appinfo> <EnumerationValue xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/">99</EnumerationValue> </xs:appinfo> </xs:annotation> </xs:enumeration> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:element name="Enums.WebCallStatus" nillable="true" type="tns:Enums.WebCallStatus"/> </xs:schema>

<xs:schema attributeFormDefault="qualified" elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:tns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/"> <xs:element name="anyType" nillable="true" type="xs:anyType"/> <xs:element name="anyURI" nillable="true" type="xs:anyURI"/> <xs:element name="base64Binary" nillable="true" type="xs:base64Binary"/> <xs:element name="boolean" nillable="true" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element name="byte" nillable="true" type="xs:byte"/> <xs:element name="dateTime" nillable="true" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element name="decimal" nillable="true" type="xs:decimal"/> <xs:element name="double" nillable="true" type="xs:double"/> <xs:element name="float" nillable="true" type="xs:float"/> <xs:element name="int" nillable="true" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element name="long" nillable="true" type="xs:long"/> <xs:element name="QName" nillable="true" type="xs:QName"/> <xs:element name="short" nillable="true" type="xs:short"/> <xs:element name="string" nillable="true" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="unsignedByte" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedByte"/> <xs:element name="unsignedInt" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedInt"/> <xs:element name="unsignedLong" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedLong"/> <xs:element name="unsignedShort" nillable="true" type="xs:unsignedShort"/> <xs:element name="char" nillable="true" type="tns:char"/> <xs:simpleType name="char"> <xs:restriction base="xs:int"/> </xs:simpleType> <xs:element name="duration" nillable="true" type="tns:duration"/> <xs:simpleType name="duration"> <xs:restriction base="xs:duration"> <xs:pattern value="\-?P(\d*D)?(T(\d*H)?(\d*M)?(\d*(\.\d*)?S)?)?"/> <xs:minInclusive value="-P10675199DT2H48M5.4775808S"/> <xs:maxInclusive value="P10675199DT2H48M5.4775807S"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:element name="guid" nillable="true" type="tns:guid"/> <xs:simpleType name="guid"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:pattern value="[\da-fA-F]{8}-[\da-fA-F]{4}-[\da-fA-F]{4}-[\da-fA-F]{4}-[\da-fA-F]{12}"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:attribute name="FactoryType" type="xs:QName"/> <xs:attribute name="Id" type="xs:ID"/> <xs:attribute name="Ref" type="xs:IDREF"/> </xs:schema>
